adjacency_graph.description: Directed adjacency graph for room connections. Edges represent spatial adjacency or direct access.

hub_rooms.description: Primary spatial hub. Central connector in the spatial graph.

rules.name: guest_toilet_no_direct_drawing_room_access
rules.description: Guest toilet must not open directly into drawing room.

rules.name: kitchen_must_connect_to_dining
rules.description: Kitchen must be directly adjacent or have direct door access to dining.

rules.name: utility_connects_to_kitchen
rules.description: Utility room must connect to kitchen.

rules.name: private_zone_not_visible_from_entry
rules.description: Bedrooms and private zones must not be directly visible or accessible from foyer or drawing room.

rules.name: family_living_is_hub
rules.description: Family living must connect to dining, corridor, and staircase.

rules.name: bathroom_attached_to_bedroom
rules.description: Each bedroom (master and standard) must have access to a bathroom via direct attachment or shared corridor bathroom within 2 room distances.

rules.name: pooja_no_toilet_adjacency
rules.description: Pooja room must not be adjacent to any toilet or bathroom.

rules.name: dining_no_toilet_adjacency
rules.description: Dining room must not be adjacent to any toilet or bathroom.

rules.name: staircase_requires_landing_at_direction_change
rules.description: Staircase must include a landing whenever the direction changes or step count exceeds 12.

rules.name: corridor_no_dead_end_exceeding_9m
rules.description: Corridors must not have dead ends exceeding 9 meters without a turning space or access point.

rules.name: min_room_height
rules.description: Habitable rooms must have a minimum ceiling height of 2.75m. Non-habitable: 2.4m.

rules.name: min_room_area
rules.description: Minimum floor areas per NBC for residential rooms.

rules.name: habitable_room_ventilation
rules.description: Habitable rooms must have window/ventilation openings equivalent to at least 1/10th of floor area for light and 1/20th for ventilation.

rules.name: staircase_headroom
rules.description: Minimum headroom clearance above staircase: 2.1m.

rules.name: staircase_rise_tread
rules.description: Stair rise must be 150-175mm. Tread must be 250-300mm. Formula: 2R + T = 600-650mm.

rules.name: bathroom_ventilation_mandatory
rules.description: All toilets and bathrooms must have ventilation to external air, courtyard, or OTS.

rules.name: kitchen_ventilation_mandatory
rules.description: Kitchen must have ventilation to external air or utility yard.

rules.name: max_fsi_compliance
rules.description: Total built-up area must not exceed FSI (Floor Space Index) permitted for the zone.
rules.note: FSI value injected as external input from local authority data.

rules.name: ground_coverage_compliance
rules.description: Ground floor footprint must not exceed the permitted ground coverage ratio.

rules.name: staircase_handrail_requirement
rules.description: Handrails required on both sides of staircase if width exceeds 1.0m.

rules.name: all_rooms_within_buildable_boundary
rules.description: All enclosed rooms must be placed within the buildable area defined by the plot boundary minus setbacks.

rules.name: setback_non_buildable
rules.description: Setback areas are non-buildable. No permanent enclosed structure may exist in setback zones.

rules.name: room_aspect_ratio
rules.description: Room width to depth ratio must be between 1:1 and 1:2.5 for habitable rooms.

rules.name: min_room_dimension
rules.description: No dimension of any habitable room shall be less than 2.4m.

rules.name: ots_minimum_dimension
rules.description: OTS voids must be minimum 0.9m x 0.9m.

rules.name: courtyard_minimum_width
rules.description: Courtyards must be minimum 2.5m wide.

rules.name: parking_minimum_dimensions
rules.description: Each car parking space must be minimum 2.5m wide x 5.0m deep.

rules.name: corridor_minimum_width
rules.description: Corridors must be minimum 1.0m wide.

rules.name: all_floors_structurally_aligned
rules.description: Upper floor footprint must not cantilever more than the structurally permissible limit over ground floor.

rules.name: driveway_frontage_condition
rules.description: Driveway generated only when frontage width is sufficient.

rules.name: habitable_room_natural_light
rules.description: All habitable rooms must have access to natural light via external wall window, courtyard, or balcony.

rules.name: ots_auto_generation
rules.description: When any habitable or wet room has no external wall, an OTS must be auto-generated adjacent to it.

rules.name: kitchen_ventilation_priority
rules.description: Kitchen ventilation priority: external_wall > utility_yard > OTS.

rules.name: bathroom_ventilation_priority
rules.description: Bathroom/toilet ventilation priority: external_wall > OTS.

rules.name: cross_ventilation_preferred
rules.description: Family living, master bedroom, and dining rooms should have openings on at least two sides for cross ventilation.

rules.name: courtyard_generation_threshold
rules.description: Courtyard is generated only when plot area >= 200sqm.

rules.name: balcony_generation_condition
rules.description: Balcony generated only when upper floor is present AND bedroom/family_living faces an open side.

rules.name: noise_buffer_for_bedrooms
rules.description: Bedrooms should not face the road directly. A noise buffer (corridor, store room, bathroom) should be placed between the road and bedrooms.

rules.name: staircase_ventilation
rules.description: Staircase must have ventilation to external air, either via window or OTS.

rules.name: utility_external_or_ots
rules.description: Utility room must have ventilation to external or OTS.

vastu_constraints.note: All Vastu rules are soft preferences only. They must NEVER override levels 1-4. Applied only when geometry permits.

rules.name: kitchen_south_east
rules.description: Kitchen preferred direction: South-East.

rules.name: master_bedroom_south_west
rules.description: Master bedroom preferred direction: South-West.

rules.name: pooja_north_east
rules.description: Pooja room preferred direction: North-East.

rules.name: entry_north_east_or_north
rules.description: Main entrance preferred direction: North-East or North.

rules.name: bathroom_not_north_east
rules.description: Bathrooms should not be placed in the North-East zone.

rules.name: staircase_not_north_east_or_center
rules.description: Staircase should not be at the center of the plot or in the North-East.

ventilation_priority_system.description: Hierarchy for assigning ventilation sources to rooms.

priority_order.description: Direct opening to exterior through building envelope.
Opening to OTS void (auto-generated if needed).

ots_generation_rules.notes: OTS must be open to sky for all floors it serves. Cannot be covered at any floor.

courtyard_generation_rules.notes: When plot area < 200sqm, do not generate courtyard. Use OTS per room instead.

balcony_generation_rules.notes: Do not generate balcony on ground floor unless plot type is raised plinth.

zone_assignment_generator.description: Assigns rooms to spatial zones based on plot analysis and input configuration.

adjacency_graph_generator.description: Generates the room adjacency graph from zone assignments and adjacency rules.

ots_generator.description: Auto-generates OTS voids when rooms lack external wall access.

courtyard_generator.description: Auto-generates courtyard when plot area is sufficient.

balcony_generator.description: Auto-generates balconies on upper floors for eligible rooms.

staircase_generator.description: Generates staircase geometry based on floor height and plot size.

parking_generator.description: Generates parking type and driveway based on plot size.

kitchen_layout_generator.description: Selects kitchen layout type based on kitchen area.

staircase_rules.description: Complete staircase generation and placement rules.

parking_rules.description: Complete parking generation and placement rules.

setback_policy.note: Parking may occupy front setback area. This is permitted as per setback_policy.

validation_rules.description: Post-generation validation checks applied to the complete layout before passing to geometry solver.

checks.description: All required adjacencies in adjacency_matrix are satisfied.
No forbidden adjacencies are present.
Family living connects to dining, corridor, and staircase.
Guest toilet does not open directly into drawing room.
Kitchen is adjacent to dining.
Utility is adjacent to kitchen.
Pooja room has no adjacent bathroom or toilet.
Dining room has no adjacent bathroom or toilet.
All habitable rooms meet NBC minimum area requirements.
All habitable rooms meet minimum ceiling height: 2.75m.
All non-habitable rooms meet minimum ceiling height: 2.4m.
Staircase rise within 150-175mm range.
Staircase tread within 250-300mm range.
Staircase headroom minimum 2.1m.
OTS minimum 0.9m x 0.9m.
Courtyard minimum width 2.5m.
Corridor minimum width 1.0m.
Parking minimum 2.5m x 5.0m.
All habitable rooms have natural light access.
All bathrooms have ventilation to external or OTS.
Kitchen has ventilation to external wall, utility yard, or OTS.
Utility has ventilation to external or OTS.
Staircase has ventilation.
No OTS is covered at any floor.
All enclosed rooms are within buildable boundary.
No enclosed room overlaps setback zone.
Total built area does not exceed FSI limit.
Ground coverage does not exceed permitted ratio.
No room has an aspect ratio outside 1:1 to 1:2.5.
Upper floor does not cantilever beyond permissible limit.
All rooms comply with NBC 2016 minimum dimensions.
Handrails provided on staircase where required.
No dead-end corridor exceeds 9m.
Landing provided at staircase direction changes.
Private zone not accessible directly from public zone.

validation_phases.note: Informational only. Vastu violations are flagged but do not block layout generation.

checks.description: Kitchen in South-East zone.
Master bedroom in South-West zone.
Pooja room in North-East zone.
Bathroom not in North-East zone.
Staircase not at center or North-East.

vastu_score.description: Percentage of Vastu soft rules satisfied.

geometry_solver_output_schema.description: Data structure emitted by this engine to feed the Geometry Layout Solver.

zone_layout.description: Zone placements with priority and floor assignments.
